title: Too many fluids
description: I added too many fluids to minecraft
body:
I Added Too Many Fluids to Minecraft!

Ever thought Minecraft needed more liquids? Well, now it has them—whether you wanted them or not!

🌊 What This Mod Adds:

This mod introduces a variety of unique and quirky fluids to enhance (or complicate) your Minecraft experience:

• **Placeable Milk Bucket** - Finally, you can place milk in the world! Create milk pools, milk waterfalls, or whatever cursed creation you can imagine.

• **Liquified TNT** - Explosive liquid that brings a whole new meaning to "fluid dynamics." Handle with extreme caution!

• **Chorus Fruit Milk** - A mysterious blend of chorus fruit and milk. What could possibly go wrong with teleporting liquid?

• **And Much More!** - Discover additional fluids as you explore the mod's features!

⌨️ Features:

• Custom keybind (P) for special mod functionality
• Fully functional fluid mechanics

🛠️ Development:

This mod was created entirely by me using MCreator. It's a solo project born from the simple question: "What if Minecraft had way too many fluids?"

🎥 Want to See More?

Check out my YouTube channel for gameplay, tutorials, and other projects: [My YT channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHPa8xi31S_LrLfv402RPxQ)

Whether you're looking to experiment with new liquid mechanics or just want to flood your world with milk, this mod has you covered. Download now and dive into the chaos!
